assertions.assertion: Calls AddClientCredentialsTokenManagement and AddClient with DPoPJsonWebKey set on the client options

assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows `client.TokenEndpoint = "https://identity.example.com/connect/token";` in the client credentials example.

assertions.assertion: Shows JWK generation using RsaSecurityKey with RSA.Create(2048) and JsonWebKeyConverter.ConvertFromSecurityKey, with Alg set to PS256
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows the exact pattern: `var rsaKey = new RsaSecurityKey(RSA.Create(2048)); var jsonWebKey = JsonWebKeyConverter.ConvertFromSecurityKey(rsaKey); jsonWebKey.Alg = "PS256";`

assertions.assertion: Warns that the DPoPJsonWebKey is a critical secret — losing it makes bound tokens unusable, leaking it nullifies DPoP security
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md states: 'The DPoPJsonWebKey is a critical secret. If lost, tokens bound to it cannot be used. If leaked, the security benefits of DPoP are lost.'
